name: ChatGPT Enterprise
description: General-purpose assistant for drafting copy, summarizing, and brainstorming campaign ideas.

name: Claude
description: Long-form writing and analysis assistant; strong at reviewing documents and brand voice.

name: Microsoft Copilot
description: AI built into Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and Outlook for drafting and summarizing inside Microsoft 365.

name: Adobe Firefly
description: Commercially-safe generative image and design tool integrated with Creative Cloud.

name: Midjourney
description: High-quality concept image generation. In limited pilot — confirm usage rights before publishing.

name: Perplexity
description: Answer engine with cited sources for quick market and competitor research.

name: Otter.ai
description: Meeting transcription and summaries. Pilot only — do not record meetings with sensitive data.

name: Synthesia
description: AI avatar video creation for internal training and explainer content.

name: Grammarly
description: Writing assistant for grammar, tone, and clarity across email and documents.

name: Consumer DeepSeek / unsanctioned chatbots
description: Do not paste Cox or customer data into unapproved public chatbots. Use approved tools above instead.
